lesson.title: Effective office administration and management
lesson.content:
Official module purpose (from QCTO Curriculum Document 334102002):

Build an understanding of administrative structures, delegation of duties, teamwork and to encourage the learner to serve as a leader or a follower, depending on what is needed to achieve the team's goals and objectives. To establish productive relationships and develop constructive and cooperative working relationships with others. This learning also guides towards an ergonomically conducive office environment.

Draft support content — must be reviewed against the official learner guide, workbook and facilitator guide when uploaded.

Until the official learner guide is uploaded by an administrator, this lesson shows the official module purpose, the linked topics, internal assessment criteria and supporting evidence only. The full teaching content will be filled in once the learner guide and workbook are received.

Use the Portfolio of Evidence to record evidence that proves the linked outcomes.
lesson.sa_scenario: A real or simulated South African office environment. Apply the official module outcomes in a workplace or simulated context until the official learner guide is uploaded.
lesson.content_notes: Lesson content is scaffold from official module purpose until learner guide is uploaded.
